home.title: Explore the Musical Universe

metadata.title: MusiGraph - Semantic Music Explorer
metadata.description: Explore the musical universe through connected semantic data. Discover relationships between artists, genres, and musical collaborations.

results.discoverDescription: Search for any artist, band, or composer to explore their musical connections, influences, and collaborations.
results.noResultsDescription: Try a different name or check the spelling. You can also try terms in English.
results.suggestion3: Try terms in English for better results

welcome.title: Welcome to the Connected Musical Universe!
